title: Incorrect cast from varchar to int8
description:
### What happens?

Expecting EXPLAIN to show casting of `'i8'::int8` to `TINYINT` to be consistent with other shorthand casts.



### To Reproduce

```
duckdb> EXPLAIN SELECT 'i8'::int8,'i16'::int16,'i32'::int32, 'i64'::int64, 'u8'::uint8, 'u16'::uint16, 'u32'::uint32, 'u64'::uint64;
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ         PROJECTION        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ в”Җ   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    CAST('i8' AS BIGINT)   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  CAST('i16' AS SMALLINT)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   CAST('i32' AS INTEGER)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   CAST('i64' AS BIGINT)   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   CAST('u8' AS UTINYINT)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  CAST('u16' AS USMALLINT) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  CAST('u32' AS UINTEGER)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   CAST('u64' AS UBIGINT)  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                             
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ         DUMMY_SCAN        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ   
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_casts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR, num_value INTEGER);
SELECT value, CAST(value AS INTEGER) AS casted_value FROM test_casts WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, CASE WHEN value = 'i8' THEN CAST('i8' AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END AS conditional_cast FROM test_casts;
SELECT CAST('i8' AS INTEGER), CAST('i16' AS INTEGER), CAST('i32' AS INTEGER), CAST('i64' AS INTEGER), CAST('u8' AS INTEGER), CAST('u16' AS INTEGER), CAST('u32' AS INTEGER), CAST('u64' AS INTEGER);
key_bug_features: Inconsistent casting from varchar to int8
